name: Dateline Resources Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 74% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1750, stop A$0.1089, target A$0.2000 (0.38:1) — then trail it.
